body_txt: Green is a color frequently associated with evil: Some form of green essence is often a feature of the Wicked Witch , and many villains — especially in superhero comics — have a green motif; usually in the form of hair, skin, clothing, or powers. This association arguably ties back to the color green itself; as a widely occurring color in nature (seen in amphibians, reptiles , and all manner of plant life), but one that doesn't appear naturally in humans — apart from a comparatively rare eye color — it has connotations of being alien. Green is also frequently associated with poison and — largely thanks to William Shakespeare — envy . Heroes who oppose such villains frequently choose red as their signature color, resulting in a Red/Green Contrast . A Sub-Trope of Good Colors, Evil Colors and Secondary-Color Nemesis , and Super-Trope to Sickly Green Glow . Watch out for Green Is Gross .        The DCU : Others
